vehicle.label: Tiltrotor VTOL Hybrid
vehicle.desc: Fixed-wing VTOL with 2 tilting rotor nacelles, BVLOS long-range capable

parts.label: Center Fuselage Spine
parts.spec: CFRP box beam center fuselage, avionics bay, wing spar socket, front GPS boom mount, belly camera window

parts.label: Main Wing (2-piece)
parts.spec: Straight wing, 4S NACA 2412, dual 15mm CFRP spar, 900mm half-span, 160mm chord, 3-layer CFRP skin

parts.label: Nacelle Assembly x 2
parts.spec: Tilting nacelle assembly, 0-90deg tilt axis, 6309 bearing set, servo-driven worm gear, motor and ESC pocket

parts.label: Tilt Servo + Linkage x 2
parts.spec: 25kg-cm DS3218 servo per nacelle, titanium pushrod, dual ball joints, tilt range 0-93deg, crash-tolerant

parts.label: V-Tail x 2 (Ruddervator)
parts.spec: +-35deg V-tail ruddervator pair, MG996R servo each, 30deg dihedral, CFRP sandwich panel, hinge piano wire

parts.label: Landing Gear (Tri)
parts.spec: Tricycle landing gear, spring-steel skid arms, 55mm dia wheels, CG at 1/3 chord, 200mm wheelbase

parts.label: Battery Bay (Slide-In)
parts.spec: Belly slide-in battery bay, 6S 8000mAh Li-ion pack, Velcro + strap dual retention, CG position 28% MAC

parts.label: Payload Nose Bay
parts.spec: Interchangeable nose payload bay, Day/IR camera gimbal or survey sensor, 80x60x50mm, 300g payload limit

parts.label: Tilt-Axis Harness + Datum Service Bay
parts.spec: Tiltrotor integration_service module with tilt-axis harness_channel, slack_loop, interface_datum, service_hatch, connector keying, and nacelle-to-wing load-path inspection access

generated_parts.label: Main Wing (2-piece)
generated_parts.spec: Straight wing, 4S NACA 2412, dual 15mm CFRP spar, 900mm half-span, 160mm chord, 3-layer CFRP skin

requirements: Straight wing, 4S NACA 2412, dual 15mm CFRP spar, 900mm half-span, 160mm chord, 3-layer CFRP skin
Wing spar carrying nacelle loads into fuselage spine; V-tail/ruddervator and landing gear attach structure
Human/service access through maintenance access cut

verify.value: All required evidence features are present and named.
verify.rule: Each required evidence feature must appear in part_tree/geometry_ops.

verify.value: Estimated mass is 3000g, which is higher than expected for a 900mm half-span wing.
verify.rule: The mass of the subsystem must not exceed the allocated budget.

verify.value: All primary features (wing_spar, spar_socket, fuselage_spine, v_tail, ruddervator, stabilizer, landing_gear_mount, gear_leg, access_cut) are traceable to geometry_ops.
verify.rule: Each primary feature must be represented by explicit geometry operations.

verify.value: All interfaces are named and have matching connection types and DOFs with neighboring subsystems.
verify.rule: Interfaces must be named and match the neighboring subsystem's interface requirements.

verify.value: All bolted interfaces have visible locking evidence (e.g., washers, locknuts).
verify.rule: Critical joints need visible locking or preload evidence.

risk.desc: High estimated mass may impact overall vehicle performance.
risk.mit: Review material selection and optimize geometry to reduce mass.

risk.desc: Lack of detailed thermal management verification may lead to overheating issues.
risk.mit: Conduct thermal simulation and testing to validate heat dissipation.

risk.desc: Insufficient motion verification may result in compromised wing spar performance.
risk.mit: Perform dynamic load testing to ensure wing spar integrity.

risk.desc: Electrical/data harness verification is not comprehensive.
risk.mit: Include detailed harness routing and connection verification.

risk.desc: Human/service access verification may be incomplete.
risk.mit: Ensure all maintenance access cuts are accessible and usable.

generated_parts.label: Nacelle Assembly x 2
generated_parts.spec: Tilting nacelle assembly, 0-90deg tilt axis, 6309 bearing set, servo-driven worm gear, motor and ESC pocket

requirements: Tilt axis load path through bearing seats into wing structure
Cooling airflow through channels and ducts for servo and ESC
Rotation of nacelle around tilt axis via servo-driven worm gear
Pressure from rotor blades transmitted through nacelle structure
Electrical connections for motor, ESC, and servo through harnesses and connectors
Service access for motor and ESC replacement
Mounting flange for fuselage spine integration
Cooling airflow channel for servo and ESC

verify.value: All required fields are present and correctly formatted.
verify.rule: Ensure all specified fields are included and properly structured.

verify.value: 1200g is within acceptable limits for the subsystem.
verify.rule: Ensure the mass estimate does not exceed the allocated budget.

verify.value: All P0 internal_feature_targets are mapped to part_tree children and geometry_ops.
verify.rule: Each P0 feature must have a corresponding geometry operation with specific coordinates.

verify.value: All interfaces have reciprocal connection types and DOFs with neighboring subsystems.
verify.rule: Interfaces must be reciprocal, with matching connection types and degrees of freedom.

verify.value: Visible locking/preload evidence is present for critical joints.
verify.rule: Critical joints must have visible locking or preload evidence.

risk.desc: Potential misalignment of tilt axis due to manufacturing tolerances.
risk.mit: Implement tighter manufacturing tolerances and conduct alignment checks post-manufacture.

risk.desc: Cooling airflow may be insufficient if channels are not properly designed.
risk.mit: Conduct airflow simulations and adjust channel dimensions accordingly.

risk.desc: Service access may be restricted if access covers are not properly aligned.
risk.mit: Ensure precise alignment of access covers during assembly.

risk.desc: Bearing seat may not adequately support loads if dimensions are incorrect.
risk.mit: Verify bearing seat dimensions and conduct load tests.

risk.desc: Servo linkage may not function correctly if clearance is insufficient.
risk.mit: Ensure sufficient clearance around servo linkage and conduct motion tests.
